title: Arctic (and Antarctic!) Sea Ice Extent: November 11, 2023
summary: November 11 2023: The sea ice has continued to increase , but at a slower rate of 5.64% (down from last week’s rate of 11.68%), from the level on 11/02/2023 of 8.774 M km 2 to 9.298 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager at NOAA’s Air Resource...
